rationale: Educ. Code §7.102 enumerates State Board of Education powers and duties (curriculum, instructional materials, accountability, etc.). It contains no provision referencing homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no direct conflict exists.
quote: The board may perform only those duties relating to school districts or regional education service centers assigned to the board by the constitution of this state or by this subchapter or another provision of this code.
_note: No provision in §7.102 addresses homestead exemption dollar amounts or property tax appraisal values. Indirect fiscal impact on school districts is possible but does not constitute a statutory conflict with this section.
